package.name: cleitonq_ros2
package.description:
Post-quantum authenticated command and control for ROS2 autonomous systems.
Implements the parallel-topic authentication pattern to defend against relay-transparent authentication stripping (GHSA-f5rj-mrxh-r7vm, draft-bezerra-relay-auth-transparency). Authentication material is published on a separate ROS2 topic so DDS bridges cannot silently discard it during re-serialization.
Algorithms: ML-KEM-1024 (FIPS 203), ML-DSA-87 (FIPS 204), HMAC-SHA3-256 (FIPS 202).
